tags.name: `mc-side-bar`
tags.description:
Purpose: A sidebar component that can be toggled open or closed, providing easy access to navigation links or other important content.
Category: Layout, Navigation, Content Display
When to use: When you need a collapsible sidebar for navigation or additional content.
When not to use: For static content that doesn't require a toggleable interface.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-card
Alternative component names: Side Navigation, Collapsible Menu, Sidebar Menu, Navigation Drawer, Slide-out Menu

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot for the `sidebar` content. Can be used to pass links list, banners, etc.

Attributes:

  * `open` {`boolean`} - 

Properties:

  * `category` {`string`} - 

  * `key` {`string`} - 

  * `scrollHandler` - 

  * `leaveTimeout` {`number | null`} - 

  * `mcDrawer` - 

  * `mcSideBar` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - 

  * `mcButton` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - 

  * `open` {`boolean`} - 

  * `bodyOverflow` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `bodyPostion` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `windowScrollTop` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `viewport` {`Viewport | undefined`} - 

  * `viewportResizeHandlerInFullScreenModal` - This is to revert modal body being pushed by the keyboard when
modal is displayed upon focusing on an input,
or close the modal when doing window resize while the modal is open.

  * `handleResize` -
